goal: Move the lead toward a booked consultation without crossing approval or cadence boundaries.
assumptions: Fast response matters for hot leads.
Repeated pressure harms conversion and increases complaint risk.
contact_plan: send DM now, confirm availability, offer booking slot, pause before any phone action if approval not granted
cadence_rule: max 1 touch per 24h unless user re-engages
approval_requirements: phone_call requires approval; dm safe within policy
